zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Lascelles於1205年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾查阿培爾 哈德萊時，她的父親John Lascelles29歲，母親Ann de Lound26歲。她和Miles Basset至少有1個女兒。她去世於1272年之後在英國英格蘭越可爾，埋葬在法爾可藍德 易曼德斯。

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Lascelles was born in 1205, in Chapel Haddlesey, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Lascelles, was 29 and her mother, Ann de Lound, was 26. She had at least 1 daughter with Miles Basset. She died after 1272, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Falkland Islands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Lascelles est née en 1205, à Chapel Haddlesey, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Lascelles, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ann de Lound, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Miles Basset. Elle est décédée après 1272, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Îles Malouines.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Lascelles 1205 in Chapel Haddlesey, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Lascelles 29 und ihre Mutter Ann de Lound 26. Sie hatte mit Miles Basset mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1272 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Falklandinseln begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Lascelles è nata il nel 1205 nel Chapel Haddlesey, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Lascelles, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Ann de Lound, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Miles Basset. Morì dopo il 1272, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Isole Falkland.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Lascellesが1205年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアチャペル ハッドレセイで生まれた時，父John Lascellesは29歳，母Ann de Loundは26歳であった。彼女はMiles Bassetとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1272年以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去し，ファルクランド イスランズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Lascelles(이)가 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 차플 하들레시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Lascelles(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann de Lound(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Miles Basset(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1272년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 사망했으며 파클랜드 이슬랜드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Lascelles nasceu em 1205, em Chapel Haddlesey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Lascelles, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Ann de Lound, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Miles Basset. Ela faleceu após 1272, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Ilhas Malvinas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Lascelles родилась в 1205 г. в местности чапел хаддлеси, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Lascelles было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann de Lound, 26. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Miles Basset. Она умерла после 1272 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности Фолклендские острова.
